introSection: Falcon is a steel roller coaster located at Duinrell in Wassenaar, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands. It has the only beyond-vertical drop in the country.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter installation. The prototype was shown at Gertslauer's testing facility in 2006.

fullText:
Falcon is a steel roller coaster located at Duinrell in Wassenaar, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands. It has the only beyond-vertical drop in the country.

This is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter installation. The prototype was shown at Gertslauer's testing facility in 2006.
